text.title: AI-Assisted Accessibility (WCAG 2.2 AA) Worked Example
text.summary: One end-to-end worked example: input → procedure → output report.

input.description: Site URL inventory + Automated scan output + AT tester roster + Conformance target

trace.step: Load axe / Lighthouse JSON; map issues to WCAG criteria.
Schedule AT tests for criteria automation cannot evaluate.
Conduct sessions; collect tester transcripts + evidence.
Emit signed JSON + PDF; archive; schedule next audit.
